description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted in a standing posture with arms raised and extended upward at a sharp angle. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless top and long pants, with visible seams and buttons on the upper garment. The person has medium-length hair styled in a side part, and the facial features are clearly defined. The shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking. The overall build is average, and the proportions are realistic, suggesting a typical adult body type. The asset is detailed enough to convey clothing folds and anatomical structure, with a focus on urban realism.
description: A standing adult pedestrian with arms raised, wearing a sleeveless top and long pants, and medium-length hair styled in a side part.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top with buttons, and both arms raised upward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side seam of the pants, and the arm extended upward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the back of the top and pants, and both arms raised behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the side seam of the pants, and the arm extended upward.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless buttoned top and long pants
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with side part
